title: aralia elata var. elata
intro: Aralia elata var. elata, also known as the Japanese angelica tree or Chinese angelica tree, is a plant species within the Araliaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Aralia elata var. elata include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are typically dried and then used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
